title: Crowd Gathering Control and Management

plan_procedures.action: Prevent crowds or unauthorized gatherings from entering the healthcare facility and its associated premises unless official instructions are received.
Investigate and determine the precise reasons behind the gathering and assess whether the situation may escalate.
Ensure deployment of sufficient security personnel to manage the gathering and establish security perimeters when required.
Notify facility leadership and communicate with specialized security authorities through the approved emergency channels.
Do not allow members of the gathering to take photographs or raise banners in the vicinity of the healthcare facility and its related premises.
Maintain continuous coordination and communication with the specialized security authorities during the entire incident.
Count the number of individuals involved, classify them according to the security situation, and submit the information to the security administration.
Assign an adequate number of security personnel to accompany persons who may be allowed entry for the purpose of meeting responsible officials inside the facility.
Do not use force except in very limited cases explicitly permitted by law and applicable regulations.
Continue monitoring the situation until it ends completely and ensure that the crowd disperses from the surrounding area of the healthcare facility.
Prepare a joint report with the specialized security authorities and submit it to facility leadership after the incident is concluded.

During interaction with the crowd, demonstrate patience, calm behavior, and respectful communication, avoid provocative verbal or physical expressions, and avoid creating fear by referring to previous incidents.

learning_objectives: Apply the correct security response when dealing with crowd gatherings near a healthcare facility.
Control access to the facility and protect surrounding premises from disruption.
Coordinate with leadership and specialized security authorities using approved channels.
Manage the situation professionally while avoiding escalation and using lawful, proportionate actions.
Complete monitoring, classification, reporting, and post-incident documentation requirements.

policy_chunks.title: Step 1
policy_chunks.text: Prevent crowds or unauthorized gatherings from entering the healthcare facility and its associated premises unless official instructions are received.

policy_chunks.title: Step 2
policy_chunks.text: Investigate and determine the precise reasons behind the gathering and assess whether the situation may escalate.

policy_chunks.title: Step 3
policy_chunks.text: Ensure deployment of sufficient security personnel to manage the gathering and establish security perimeters when required.

policy_chunks.title: Step 4
policy_chunks.text: Notify facility leadership and communicate with specialized security authorities through the approved emergency channels.

policy_chunks.title: Step 5
policy_chunks.text: Do not allow members of the gathering to take photographs or raise banners in the vicinity of the healthcare facility and its related premises.

policy_chunks.title: Step 6
policy_chunks.text: Maintain continuous coordination and communication with the specialized security authorities during the entire incident.

policy_chunks.title: Step 7
policy_chunks.text: Count the number of individuals involved, classify them according to the security situation, and submit the information to the security administration.

policy_chunks.title: Step 8
policy_chunks.text: Assign an adequate number of security personnel to accompany persons who may be allowed entry for the purpose of meeting responsible officials inside the facility.

policy_chunks.title: Step 9
policy_chunks.text: Do not use force except in very limited cases explicitly permitted by law and applicable regulations.

policy_chunks.title: Step 10
policy_chunks.text: Continue monitoring the situation until it ends completely and ensure that the crowd disperses from the surrounding area of the healthcare facility.

policy_chunks.title: Step 11
policy_chunks.text: Prepare a joint report with the specialized security authorities and submit it to facility leadership after the incident is concluded.

policy_chunks.title: Behavior and Communication
policy_chunks.text: During interaction with crowd situations, security personnel should demonstrate patience and calmness, show good conduct, avoid provocative verbal or physical expressions, and avoid creating fear by referencing previous incidents.
